toast.alreadyRunning: Another model is already downloading — please wait for it to finish
toast.modelNotDownloaded: Model "{{model}}" is not downloaded. Please download it from the Models tab first.

error.network: Network connection failed. Please check your connection and retry.
error.disk: Not enough disk space. This model needs approximately {{needed}}, but only {{free}} is available.
error.permission: Cannot write to the models directory. Please check read/write permissions on {{path}}.
error.remote: HuggingFace returned an error ({{code}}). Please try again later.
error.verify: Download finished but files are incomplete. Please retry.
error.interrupted: Download was interrupted by app shutdown. Click Retry to resume.
